question: Comment organiser la hierarchie visuelle des surfaces (elevation) ?

principles.text: 5 niveaux (0=base, 1=cards/sidebars, 2=dropdowns/popovers, 3=modals/dialogs, 4=toasts). Tonal elevation en dark mode. Semantic tokens --elevation-0 a --elevation-4. En light mode, ombre portee croissante. En dark mode, surface de plus en plus claire.

sources.name: M3 Elevation
sources.quote: Five levels of elevation from 0dp to 5dp

sources.name: M3 Tone-based Surfaces
sources.quote: Surfaces use tonal color to indicate elevation in dark theme

sources.name: Apple HIG Materials
sources.quote: Use materials to indicate hierarchy and depth

sources.name: GitLab Pajamas Elevation
sources.quote: Consistent elevation scale across all components

sources.name: designsystems.surf
sources.quote: Survey of elevation patterns across 50+ design systems
